doc_content.summary: Extracts durable knowledge from specifications, plans, and review files into long-term project documentation. Operates in two passes: first extracting structured knowledge from inputs into JSON, then strategically routing it to the appropriate output files like ADRs, retrospectives, reference documents, and glossaries.
key_features: Two-pass LLM extraction and routing completed natively in a single session
Automatically generates and updates ADRs, Retrospectives, Glossaries, and Learning Logs
Smart duplicate detection for architectural decisions and learning log observations
Batch processing mode to run across entire specification directories
Maintains execution history for idempotency with `--force` override support
Auto-commits generated documentation locally unless restricted by dirty trees or flags

alt_text: A documentation page visualizing the stark-extract-docs skill, showing the CLI usage, available flags, extraction categories mapped to their documentation outputs, and the two-pass execution workflow.
